document.title: Advising Workflow Rollout Notice
document.line: Purpose: Confirm department readiness for the new advising workflow before student registration opens.
Location: Administration Building Room 204 and Teams backup link
Required Attendees: undergraduate program directors, advising coordinators, registrar liaison, and department schedulers
Agenda: review intake form routing, escalation rules, appointment capacity, and unresolved transfer-credit exceptions
Preparation: Bring department feedback, list of blocked cases, and names of staff who still need system access.
Follow-up Deadline: Final exception list due May 7, 2026 by 5:00 PM
